title: DevPilot Local Schema Catalog
purpose: Catalog of versioned JSON schemas registered by DevPilot. POST-H-002-A adds the MaturityDashboard contract for local, evidence-based maturity reporting without remote or production-overclaiming. POST-H-003-A adds the Test Contract Registry v2 design schema while preserving v1 compatibility. POST-H-004-A registers the MiasiSemanticReport contract for local, non-executing Policy/MIASI semantic validation reports. POST-H-005-A registers the ArchitectureMap contract for executable architecture inventory and dependency ownership baselines without running AST inventory yet. POST-H-007-B registers ApplicationOperationCatalog for declarative ApplicationService operation mapping, schema validation and test coverage metadata without changing runtime behavior. POST-H-008-A registers RuntimeStatePolicy and RuntimeStateInventory schemas for local lifecycle taxonomy, retention, clean ZIP hygiene and read-only inventory without enabling cleanup execution; POST-H-008-B expands RuntimeStateInventory for concrete scanner reports. POST-H-008-C registers RuntimeStateCleanupPlan for dry-run-first cleanup planning with explicit execute confirmation and source-of-truth never-delete safeguards.

schemas.title: DevPilot Runtime State Policy v1
schemas.description: Declarative local-first policy for runtime artifact classification, retention, cleanup/export permissions, redaction and clean ZIP hygiene.

schemas.title: DevPilot Runtime State Inventory v1
schemas.description: Structural contract for POST-H-008-B read-only runtime-state inventory reports produced from RuntimeStatePolicy.

schemas.title: DevPilot Runtime State Cleanup Plan v1
schemas.description: Structural contract for POST-H-008-C dry-run-first cleanup plans, grouping artifacts into safe-cleanup, requires-approval, never-delete and retained with explicit execute safeguards.

schemas.title: DevPilot Runtime State Export Manifest v1
schemas.description: Structural contract for POST-H-008-D redacted runtime evidence export manifests with checksums, metadata-only binary handling and no raw prompt/output payloads.

schemas.title: DevPilot Runtime State Hygiene Report v1
schemas.description: Structural contract for POST-H-008-E runtime-state hygiene and release archive checks, including git archive/source archive cleanliness and versioned runtime artifact blocking.
